---
id: 699c8e045ee7cb94ed2322d7
title: "Zoezi la 216: Siku ya Pi"
challengeType: 28
dashedName: challenge-216
---

# --description--

Heri ya siku ya pi (π)!

Ukipata nambari kamili (`n`), ambapo `n` iko kati ya 1 na 1000 (ikiwa ni pamoja), rudisha desimali ya `n` ya π.

- Hakikisha kurudisha nambari, si mfuatano wa herufi.

π na desimali zake tano za kwanza ni 3.14159. Kwa mfano ukipata `5`, rudisha `9`, desimali ya tano.

Huenda ukahitaji kutafuta desimali 1000 za kwanza za π mahali fulani.

# --hints--

`getPiDecimal(5)` inapaswa kurudisha `9`.

```js
assert.strictEqual(getPiDecimal(5), 9);
```

`getPiDecimal(10)` inapaswa kurudisha `5`.

```js
assert.strictEqual(getPiDecimal(10), 5);
```

`getPiDecimal(22)` inapaswa kurudisha `6`.

```js
assert.strictEqual(getPiDecimal(22), 6);
```

`getPiDecimal(39)` inapaswa kurudisha `7`.

```js
assert.strictEqual(getPiDecimal(39), 7);
```

`getPiDecimal(76)` inapaswa kurudisha `2`.

```js
assert.strictEqual(getPiDecimal(76), 2);
```

`getPiDecimal(384)` inapaswa kurudisha `4`.

```js
assert.strictEqual(getPiDecimal(384), 4);
```

`getPiDecimal(601)` inapaswa kurudisha `0`.

```js
assert.strictEqual(getPiDecimal(601), 0);
```

`getPiDecimal(1000)` inapaswa kurudisha `9`.

```js
assert.strictEqual(getPiDecimal(1000), 9);
```

# --seed--

## --seed-contents--

```js
function getPiDecimal(n) {

  return n;
}
```

# --solutions--

```js
function getPiDecimal(n) {
  const pi = ""

  return Number(pi[n]);
}
```
